Class NetBeansIconProvider

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.nb.mine.NetBeansIconProvider
All Implemented Interfaces:
IconProvider
public class NetBeansIconProvider extends Object implements IconProvider
A NetBeans-specific implementation of IconProvider that fetches authentic, annotated IDE icons for projects and files.

This provider ensures that the Context tab displays the exact same icons as the Projects and Files tabs, including Git badges and error markers.

Author:
anahata

  • Constructor Details

    • NetBeansIconProvider

      public NetBeansIconProvider()

  • Method Details

    • getIconFor

      public Icon getIconFor(ContextProvider cp)
      Gets an icon for a specific context provider.

      Implementation details: 1. If the provider is a project, retrieves the authentic project icon (including badges). 2. If the provider is a resource with a NbHandle, uses the IDE's DataObject mechanism to fetch the live, annotated icon (Git/Error badges). 3. Falls back to the global registry for static icons.

      Specified by:
      getIconFor in interface IconProvider
      Parameters:
      cp - The context provider.
      Returns:
      The icon, or null if not available.

    • getIconFor

      public Icon getIconFor(AbstractToolkit<?> toolkit)
      Gets an icon for a specific toolkit.

      This implementation returns null to delegate icon resolution to the renderer's default toolkit logic (typically rendering java.png for toolkits).

      Specified by:
      getIconFor in interface IconProvider
      Parameters:
      toolkit - The toolkit.
      Returns:
      The icon, or null if not available.

    • getIconFor

      public Icon getIconFor(AbstractTool<?,?> tool)
      Gets an icon for a specific tool.

      This implementation returns null to delegate icon resolution to the renderer's default tool logic.

      Specified by:
      getIconFor in interface IconProvider
      Parameters:
      tool - The tool.
      Returns:
      The icon, or null if not available.
